description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test: fingerprint that runs on a schedule (Monday to Friday at 21:00), on pull requests to the master branch, and on manual dispatch. The workflow performs an activity check and then runs fingerprint tests in a matrix of debug and release modes, with a ccache cache. The activity check determines if the repository has been active in the last 24 hours. If active, the workflow checks out two repositories, installs dependencies, configures and compiles the code, and runs fingerprint tests in parallel across multiple splits.
